creator: locnar@locnar.net
text:
Ok, I had an old install of openssl from the ports collection and once I uninstalled it, the compile worked as expected.  I have updated all my issues, and even found some good old cruft in my /etc/make.conf that was causing issues for years.  

NO BUG, problem is the user.

Please close this, as it is not a bug, it is a human issue.
